posts.title: Welcome to the KE64 blog
posts.excerpt: Updates, upcoming events, and news for the Kenyan Chess.com community — starting here.
posts.body:
This is where I'll be posting **updates**, upcoming tournaments, and general chess news for the Kenyan community.

A few things to expect here:

- Upcoming online and OTB events
- Notable results from Kenyan players
- Site updates (new features on the tracker)

Got something worth posting — a tournament, a result, an announcement? [Reach out](mailto:wangombsimon@gmail.com) and I'll get it up.

> This post is just a template — edit or delete it in `blog/posts.json` once you've got real content.
